title: Sichuan Chicken Chili

ingredients.title: For the Chicken
items: 250g boneless chicken thigh, cut into 1.5 cm cubes

ingredients.title: Aromatics & Chilies
items: 1 cup dried Chinese red chilies, deseeded and halved
Optional: 1 tbsp roasted peanuts or toasted sesame seeds

instruction.title: Marinate the Chicken
steps: Mix chicken with Shaoxing wine, soy sauce, salt, pepper, egg white, and cornstarch.

instruction.title: Fry the Chicken
steps: Deep-fry chicken in batches for 2–3 minutes until golden and crisp.
Drain on paper towels or a rack.

instruction.title: Stir-Fry Aromatics
steps: Keep 2 tbsp oil in wok, remove excess.
Add dried chilies and stir-fry for 20–30 seconds.
Add ginger, garlic, and scallions until fragrant.

instruction.title: Combine
steps: Add fried chicken back into the wok.
Stir-fry on high heat for 1–2 minutes.
Adjust salt and add optional sugar or sesame oil.

chefTips: Do not burn dried chilies — they turn bitter quickly.
Sichuan peppercorn gives the signature numbing sensation.
Traditionally, chilies are not eaten — only used for aroma.
